description: You are an energy engineer retrofitting a 4-storey commercial office building ('4StoreyBuilding'). Occupants on the Top Floor (T.*) have reported thermal discomfort at the perimeter. Install a dedicated hydronic heating system for the top floor perimeter zones (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34) in the eQUEST model. The system must include a Hot Water Loop named 'Perimeter_HW_Loop' (Type: Pipe, Subtype: Hot Water) with a Design Supply Temperature of 180°F and a Boiler named 'Perimeter_Boiler' with a Heat Input Ratio (HIR) of 1.04. Configure the four perimeter zones to use 'Hot Water' baseboard heating linked to the 'Perimeter_HW_Loop' with a baseboard capacity of 15,000 BTU/hr and 'Thermostatic' control for each. Run the annual simulation and save the project.
